title: Multi-Tenant Workspaces
description: Users belong to workspaces. POST /api/workspaces creates a workspace. POST /api/workspaces/:id/members adds a user to a workspace. GET /api/workspaces/:id/items returns only items that belong to that workspace. Items are scoped to workspace — you can't see items from other workspaces.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Workspaces table:
  name, required

create a Members table:
  workspace_id, required
  user_id, required

create a Items table:
  title, required
  workspace_id, required

# Your endpoints here
